'''Olall Da'aapp''' was a [[Gruvian]] tourist often seen at [[Kuat Passenger Port]]. Da'aapp was always accompanied by [[Benja Da'aapp]], though it is unclear how they were related.

Both Gruvians were gregarious and talkative, often adopting random passing [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] as traveling companions, telling them endless tales of the places they had visited, and getting them to take pictures for them with one of their many recording devices.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-02-XX -->''[[Platt's Starport Guide]]'' {{1stm}}
